import asyncio
from run import run_tasks

results = []

async def make_task(n):
    async def task():
        results.append(f'task_{n}_start')
        await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
        results.append(f'task_{n}_end')
    return task

async def main():
    tasks = [await make_task(i) for i in range(5)]
    await run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent=2)
    print('Results:', results)
    assert len([r for r in results if '_start' in r]) == 5
    assert len([r for r in results if '_end' in r]) == 5
    print('Test passed!')

asyncio.run(main())
